headline: NiSource (NI) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Lloyd M. Yates: Thank you, Durgesh, and good morning, everyone.  At NiSource Inc., our mission is to deliver safe, reliable, and competitive energy that drives value for our customers.  NiSource Inc.’s value proposition is anchored in regulated utility operations across six highly constructive jurisdictions, providing diversification in both asset mix and regulatory environment.

headline: NiSource Q1 Earnings Match Estimates, Revenues Lag, EPS Growth Rate Up
summary: NI matches Q1 EPS estimates as revenues rise 9%. The company has lifted its long-term EPS growth outlook and mapped $28.6B in 2026-30 capex.

headline: NiSource Announces First Quarter Results
summary: MERRILLVILLE, Ind., May 06, 2026--NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) today announced, on a GAAP basis, net income available to common shareholders for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 of $510.7 million, or $1.06 of earnings per diluted share, compared to net income available to common shareholders of $474.8 million, or $1.00 of earnings per diluted share, for the same period of 2025.
